caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering sits behind a dark desk in a studio. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring several repeated gold stars and the text "UNION HUSTLE." Above him, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of his face, and a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT" sits on the desk to his right. The man is speaking, with his mouth slightly open and his gaze directed toward someone off-camera to his left. His right hand rests on the desk. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and attire, with only slight shifts in his facial expression and mouth movement as he continues to speak.
